spec_match.rationale: The repaired lab tests the exact border-width, outline-width, and column-rule-width decoupling contract with the right CSSOM surface for each property.

interactive.rationale: The property selector, width input, style selector, and matrix runner all update live probes and result rows.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature-index blurb now matches the page's exact compatibility matrix and computed-versus-used value framing.

edge_cases.rationale: The page covers none, hidden, painting styles, the border getComputedStyle() used-value edge, and malformed width rejection.

references.rationale: The page cites the ChromeStatus feature link for 5133099851317248.

design_system.rationale: The repaired UI uses shared CSS variables, no raw hex colors, and no source inline event handlers.

summary: Open critique items repaired for this concept. DevTools MCP verification exercised the property pair selector, width input, style selector, and run-matrix button at http://localhost:3000/v147/css-update-decoupling-of-width-and-style-properties/compatibility-lab/?verify=after-width-style-local-2; border none/hidden rows passed through computedStyleMap(), outline and column-rule rows passed through getComputedStyle(), the malformed width branch was rejected, and ChromeStatus linked to 5133099851317248. Console and network were clean, and the feature conformance route passed 7 of 7 assertions in Chrome 148.
